Bash(curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST "https://meme.24x365.online/api/memories/search" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"", "project_id":"mem-mesh", "limit":3}' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for r in data.get\('results', []\):
    print\(f\\"[{r.get\('category'\)}] {r.get\('source','?'\)} | {r.get\('created_at','?'\)[:19]}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  {r.get\('content',''\)[:100]}\\"\)
    print\(\)
")

")
